name: vscode
description: VS Code in the browser, editing /workspace.

params.description: GitHub PR or issue URL — PRs are cloned with the PR branch checked out, issues clone master on a new issue-N branch, into /workspace/dashboard
Node.js version for the terminal (installed via fnm); defaults to what rancher/dashboard:master uses
GitHub token for the gh CLI (also wired into git via gh auth setup-git)
